description_long: This is a well-dressed adult male figure wearing a tailored three-piece suit, complete with a jacket, waistcoat, and trousers. The suit is complemented by a collared dress shirt and a necktie, giving the appearance of a professional or businessperson. The figure's shoes are formal and polished, matching the overall sophisticated attire. The facial features are clean-shaven, and the hairstyle is neatly groomed and short. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the posture is upright and confident. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a formal, urban look.
description: A professionally dressed adult male in a tailored suit, dress shirt, and tie, standing upright with formal shoes and a neat hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit ensemble, tie, shirt collar, facial features, and both hands open at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the straight posture with one arm visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit jacket and trousers, with the back of the head and both arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, suit details, and the relaxed arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with jacket, waistcoat, dress shirt, and necktie
